# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_command:
        description: 'Build command to execute'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'npm ci && npm run build'
          - 'npm ci && npm run build:prod'
          - 'npm ci && npm test'
          - 'pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m pytest'
          - 'pip install -r requirements.txt && python setup.py build'
          - 'mvn clean install'
          - 'mvn clean package -DskipTests'
          - 'gradle build'
          - 'gradle build -x test'
          - 'make build'
          - 'make build && make test'
          - 'dotnet build --configuration Release'
          - 'dotnet build --configuration Release && dotnet test'
          - 'cargo build --release'
          - 'cargo build --release && cargo test'
        default: 'npm ci && npm run build'
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for the build'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '.'
          - './src'
          - './app'
          - './backend'
          - './frontend'
        default: '.'
      node_version:
        description: 'Node.js version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '18'
          - '20'
          - '22'
        default: '20'
      python_version:
        description: 'Python version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '3.10'
          - '3.11'
          - '3.12'
        default: '3.12'
      java_version:
        description: 'Java version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '11'
          - '17'
          - '21'
        default: '17'
      upload_artifacts:
        description: 'Upload build artifacts'
        required: false
        type: boolean
        default: false
      artifact_path:
        description: 'Path to artifacts to upload'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'dist/'
          - 'build/'
          - 'target/'
          - 'out/'
          - 'artifacts/'
          - 'bin/'
        default: 'dist/'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      is_valid: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.is_valid }}
      runtime: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.runtime }}
    steps:
      - name: Validate inputs
        id: validate
        run: |
          echo "Build command: ${{ inputs.build_command }}"
          echo "Working directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}"
          echo "is_valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Detect runtime
        id: detect
        run: |
          BUILD_CMD="${{ inputs.build_command }}"
          if echo "$BUILD_CMD" | grep -qE '^(npm|npx) '; then
            echo "runtime=node" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif echo "$BUILD_CMD" | grep -qE '^(pip|python) '; then
            echo "runtime=python" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif echo "$BUILD_CMD" | grep -qE '^(mvn|gradle) '; then
            echo "runtime=java" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif echo "$BUILD_CMD" | grep -qE '^dotnet '; then
            echo "runtime=dotnet" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif echo "$BUILD_CMD" | grep -qE '^cargo '; then
            echo "runtime=rust" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "runtime=generic" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

  build:
    needs: validate-inputs
    if: needs.validate-inputs.outputs.is_valid == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: needs.validate-inputs.outputs.runtime == 'node'
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}/package-lock.json

      - name: Setup Python
        if: needs.validate-inputs.outputs.runtime == 'python'
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}
          cache: 'pip'

      - name: Setup Java
        if: needs.validate-inputs.outputs.runtime == 'java'
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}

      - name: Setup .NET
        if: needs.validate-inputs.outputs.runtime == 'dotnet'
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
        with:
          dotnet-version: '8.0.x'

      - name: Setup Rust
        if: needs.validate-inputs.outputs.runtime == 'rust'
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - name: Verify working directory exists
        run: |
          if [ ! -d "${{ inputs.working_directory }}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Working directory '${{ inputs.working_directory }}' does not exist"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Run build command
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: ${{ inputs.build_command }}

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: inputs.upload_artifacts == true
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}/${{ inputs.artifact_path }}
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: warn
